overview.description: Amazon.com, Inc. engages in the retail sale of consumer products, advertising, and subscriptions service through online and physical stores in North America and internationally. The company operates through three segments: North America, International, and Amazon Web Services (AWS). It also manufactures and sells electronic devices, including Kindle, fire tablets, fire TVs, echo, ring, blink, and eero; and develops and produces media content. In addition, the company offers programs that enable sellers to sell their products in its stores; and ...
overview.financialIntro: In 2025, Amazon's revenue was $716.92 billion, an increase of 12.38% compared to the previous year's $637.96 billion. Earnings were $77.67 billion, an increase of 31.09%.
overview.analystIntro: According to 67 analysts, the average rating for AMZN stock is "Strong Buy." The 12-month stock price target is $312.99, which is an increase of 37.88% from the latest price.

data.title: Amid Amazon's Robot Surge, Proteus Charts a New Path Forward
data.text: Many of your Prime Day orders are being handled by Roomba-esque bots as part of Amazon's quest to deliver packages faster.

data.title: EU says Amazon, Microsoft cloud services should face stricter rules
data.text: The EU said Thursday that the cloud services of Amazon and Microsoft should face tougher digital competition rules in Europe because of their dominant position in the sector.

data.title: Amazon ups India bet with fresh $13B AI infrastructure investment
data.text: Amazon on Thursday said it would invest an additional $13 billion to expand its AI and cloud footprint in India through 2030.

data.title: Amazon announces plans to expand Amazon Now to over 300 cities in India
data.text: Amazon announced its plans to build India’s largest ‘delivery in minutes’ network by scaling Amazon Now, its “ultra-fast” delivery within minutes, to customers in over 300 cities across the country.

data.title: Amazon, Microsoft's Cloud Services Should Fall Under DMA, EU Says
data.text: Under the Digital Markets Act, the companies would be treated as gatekeepers for their cloud computing services and required to take extra steps to ensure they don't stifle competition.

data.text: Amazon and Microsoft's cloud computing services should be designated ​gatekeepers under EU rules aimed ‌at reining in the power of Big Tech, EU antitrust regulators said on ​Thursday.

data.text: Amazon announces fresh investment of $13 billion to expand AI and cloud infrastructure in India. CEO Andy Jassy said Amazon is committed to being a long-term partner in India's growth story.

data.title: Amazon is on a mission to optimize warehouse work. Its latest test puts wearable devices on support staff.
data.text: Amazon wants to automatically capture data for warehouse roles tied to $2.8 billion in labor spend. The goal is to enhance warehouse staffing efficiency.

data.title: Zoox to ramp up production of up to 100 newly upgraded robotaxis a week
data.text: Zoox revealed a refreshed robotaxi design that the company says will improve rider experience. The update comes as the company prepares to ramp up vehicle production at its Hayward factory.

data.title: Amazon's Zoox Redesigns Robotaxi for Large-Scale Production
data.text: Zoox plans to move the new robotaxi into large-scale production soon, expecting it will become available to riders later this year.
